zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton於1240年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維爾頓時，他的父親John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby36歲，母親Emma Cauz32歲。他於1258年與Lady Maud de Longchamp在英國賀福爾維爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1280年被列為justice of chester。他去世於1308年4月5日在英國英格蘭賀福爾洛--也享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton于1240年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾維爾頓时，他的父亲John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby36岁，母亲Emma Cauz32岁。他于1258年与Lady Maud de Longchamp在英国賀福爾維爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1280年被列为justice of chester。他去世于1308年4月5日在英国英格兰賀福爾洛--也享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton was born in 1240, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby, was 36 and his mother, Emma Cauz, was 32. He married Lady Maud de Longchamp in 1258, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1280, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as justice of chester. He died on 5 April 1308, in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton est né en 1240, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Emma Cauz, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Lady Maud de Longchamp en 1258, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1280, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of chester. Il est décédé le 5 avril 1308, à Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton 1240 in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby 36 und seine Mutter Emma Cauz 32. Er hat 1258 in Wilton, Herefordshire, England Lady Maud de Longchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1280, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice of chester aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. April 1308 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton è nato il nel 1240 nel Wilton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Emma Cauz, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Lady Maud de Longchamp nel 1258, nel Wilton, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1280, all'età di 40 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of chester. Morì il 5 aprile 1308, nel Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wiltonが1240年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derbyは36歳，母Emma Cauzは32歳であった。1258年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンでLady Maud de Longchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1280年，40歳の時，職業はjustice of chesterと記録されている。彼は1308年4月5日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアロス-オン-ウイで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton(이)가 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Cauz(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1258년 영국 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 Lady Maud de Longchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1280년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 justice of chester이었다. 그는 1308년 4월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 로스--w예에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton nasceu em 1240, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Emma Cauz, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Maud de Longchamp em 1258, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1280, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice of chester. Ele faleceu em 5 de abril de 1308, em Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton родился в 1240 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Cauz, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Maud de Longchamp в 1258 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1280 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии justice of chester. Он умер 5 апреля 1308 г. в местности росс-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton nació en 1240, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Emma Cauz, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Lady Maud de Longchamp en 1258, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1280, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era justice of chester. Murió el 5 de abril de 1308, en Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
